content.problemStatement:
Chef got his dream seat in `F1` and secured a 3rd3^{rd}3rd place in his debut race. He now wants to know the time gap between him and the winner of the race.

You are his chief engineer and you only know the time gap between Chef and the runner up of the race, given as AAA seconds, and the time gap between the runner up and the winner of the race, given as BBB seconds.

Please calculate and inform Chef about the time gap between him and the winner of the race.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single line of input containing two space-separated integers AAA and BBB denoting the time gap between Chef and the runner up and the time gap between the runner up and the winner respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output the time gap between Chef and the winner of the race.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains two space‑separated integers A and B denoting the time gap (in seconds) between Chef and the runner‑up, and between the runner‑up and the winner respectively.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the time gap between Chef and the winner (i.e., A+B).

sampleTestCases.explanation: For each line we add the two numbers: 1+1=2, 2+5=7, 3+2=5, 5+6=11.

solution.approach: For each test case read the two integers A and B and output their sum. The operation is O(1) per test case, so the total complexity is linear in T.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – one addition per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used.

code.Python3:
import sys

def main():
    data = sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
    if not data:
        return
    t = int(data[0])
    out = []
    idx = 1
    for _ in range(t):
        a = int(data[idx]); b = int(data[idx+1]); idx += 2
        out.append(str(a + b))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
